name: titon
description: Slash commands for working with Titon network protocols. Four products on equal footing: Kronos automation (TSA-audited — zero findings; register jobs, run automatons, decode events, debug exit codes), Fortuna threshold-BLS VRF (TSA-audited — zero findings; integrate consumers, monitor randomness, debug exit codes), Phoebe price oracle (TSA-audited — zero findings; integrate consumers, consume verified prices via fetchVerifiedPrice / fetch_verified_price, decode events, debug reverts, deploy + admit), and Themis sealed-bid threshold-decryption (TSA-audited — zero findings; deploy a per-dapp chamber via the singleton factory, write a Tolk RevealCallback consumer, build a bidder flow, debug reverts). ForgeTON pool ops surfaced through all four. Kronos / Fortuna / Phoebe recipes ship in TypeScript + Python flavours backed by PyPI packages (titon-network-{kronos,fortuna,phoebe}-sdk); Themis is TypeScript-only today (Python parity follow-up). More protocols as they ship.
